title: Time tracking in My Work
excerpt: I would love to be able to use the time tracking column in the my work section. It would be great to be able to start and stop the timer here.

posts.author: thatgooeygirl (Sadie McAdams)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to use the time tracking column in the my work section. It would be great to be able to start and stop the timer here.
